rule_text: If both first and second tender calls receive abnormally high quoted percentages or evidence collusion/unethical practices, AP works may be entrusted on Selection Basis from a list of eligible contractors with proven track record — invited in batches of 5 to file price bids before competent committee.
verification_method: If award method=SelectionBasis: check failed-2-calls record + selection committee minutes + 5-contractor batch invitations

rule_text: Selection-basis Committee composition for AP works: works <= Rs.1 crore — Collector + concerned SE + 2 SEs from other works depts (PR/R&B/Irrigation); works > Rs.1 crore — COT + concerned CE + ENC (Irrigation).
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND AwardMethod=SelectionBasis
verification_method: Check committee composition matches threshold: <=Rs.1cr → 4-member district committee; >Rs.1cr → 3-member State committee

rule_text: Nomination-basis lists of contractors for AP works must be published every 6 months; from these lists contractors are called in groups of 5 in rotation; selection committee has 5 days to decide; total value of works grounded in any year (tenders + nomination) shall not exceed the divisional budget.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND AwardMethod=Nomination
verification_method: Check 6-monthly nomination-list publication + 5-contractor rotation + 5-day decision; verify aggregate awards <= divisional budget

rule_text: Sub-contracting in AP works: prime contractor must declare sub-contractor at tender filing or during execution with name + qualification + experience; the Tender Accepting Authority verifies sub-contractor satisfies qualification criteria PROPORTIONAL to sub-let value; total sub-letting must NOT exceed 50% of contract value; sub-let portion adds to sub-contractor's experience and is deducted from prime's experience.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND SubContractingProposed=true
verification_method: Check sub-contract declaration + qualification verification proportional to sub-let value + total sub-let <= 50% of contract value
